content.text:
Complete the Secure Exam Scheduling & Notification Management System. The backend APIs and frontend foundation (auth, scheduling, roster, notification UI) are already built under `repo/`. Now implement the admin dashboards, review queue UIs, and polish end-to-end integration.
ADMIN DASHBOARD PAGE (/admin/dashboard):
Implement the dashboard stats view calling GET /dashboard/stats?termId=X:
- Summary cards: Total Sessions, Upcoming Sessions, Total Students, Pending Reviews, Failed Jobs, Pending Anti-Cheat Flags
- Recent Activity timeline (last 10 audit log entries)
- Quick-action buttons: "Create Session", "Review Queue", "Job Monitor"
- Term selector dropdown at the top to switch dashboard context
USER MANAGEMENT PAGE (/admin/users):
- DataTable with columns: Username, Display Name, Roles, Status, Created At
- Filters: role dropdown, status dropdown, search by name/username
- Create User dialog: username, password (with strength meter), display name, role selection, scope assignment (grade/class/course/term)
- Edit User dialog: update roles, scopes, status
- Row actions: Edit, Delete (soft), Unlock Account, Toggle Concurrent Sessions
- PII masking toggle for student ID column
JOB MONITOR PAGE (/admin/jobs):
- DataTable with columns: Job Type, Dedup Key, Status, Attempts, Error Message, Created At, Completed At
- Filters: jobType dropdown, status dropdown (PENDING, RUNNING, COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELLED)
- Status badges with colors (green=completed, red=failed, yellow=running, gray=pending)
- Row action: "Retry" button for FAILED jobs → calls POST /jobs/{jobId}/retry
- Job detail modal showing full payload_json
AUDIT LOG PAGE (/admin/audit-logs):
- DataTable with columns: User, Action, Resource, Resource ID, IP Address, Timestamp
- Filters: userId, resource type dropdown, action dropdown, date range picker
- Click row → Expand to show details_json (formatted JSON viewer)
- Export button to download filtered audit logs as CSV
COMPLIANCE REVIEW QUEUE PAGE (/admin/compliance-reviews):
- DataTable with columns: Content Type, Title, Status, Created At
- Status filter tabs: Pending | Approved | Rejected
- Click row → Review detail page:
  - Content preview (notification title + body)
  - Target scope details (which grade/subject this targets)
  - Approve / Reject buttons with comments textarea
  - Confirmation modal before action
- Badge count of pending reviews in sidebar navigation
ANTI-CHEAT REVIEW QUEUE PAGE (/admin/anti-cheat):
- DataTable with columns: Student Name, Flag Type, Review Status, Created At
- Status filter tabs: Pending | Cleared | Confirmed Fraud
- Click row → Review detail page:
  - Student information
  - Flag type and details visualization:
    - ACTIVITY_BURST: Timeline chart showing action density
    - IDENTICAL_SUBMISSIONS: Side-by-side submission comparison
    - ABNORMAL_SCORE_DELTA: Chart showing score vs class distribution
  - Decision form: CLEARED or CONFIRMED_FRAUD radio + comments textarea
  - No automated punitive actions — human review only
- Badge count of pending flags in sidebar navigation
NOTIFICATION MANAGEMENT PAGE (/admin/notifications):
- DataTable: Title, Event Type, Priority, Status, Compliance Status, Published By, Created At
- Status filter tabs: Draft | Pending Review | Approved | Sending | Sent | Rejected
- Create Notification flow:
  1. Form: eventType, title, body, priority, targetScope (grade/subject pickers)
  2. Preview step showing formatted notification
  3. Submit → Creates DRAFT
  4. "Submit for Review" button → PENDING_REVIEW
  5. After compliance approval → "Publish" button → triggers send job
- Delivery status view: Click notification → tab showing per-recipient delivery status (DataTable with recipient name, channel, status, attempts)
- Manual retry button for failed deliveries
VERSION HISTORY UI:
- Accessible from Exam Session detail, Roster, Proctor Assignment, Room Assignment pages
- "History" tab/button that opens version list panel
- Version list: version number, changed by, changed at, snapshot preview
- Compare mode: Select two versions → side-by-side diff view (VersionDiff component)
- Restore button (Admin/Academic Affairs only) with confirmation dialog
- Toast notification on successful restore
CAMPUS & ROOM MANAGEMENT PAGE:
- Campus list with expandable rows showing rooms
- Add/Edit Campus dialog
- Add/Edit Room dialog with capacity field
- Room capacity visualization (used/total bar)
INTEGRATION & POLISH:
1. Error Handling: Global error interceptor → map backend error codes to user-friendly Chinese/English messages. Show toast notifications for errors.
2. Loading States: Skeleton loaders on all data tables and detail pages.
3. Empty States: Meaningful illustrations and messages when lists are empty.
4. Breadcrumb Navigation: Contextual breadcrumbs on all pages.
5. Notification Badge: Real-time unread count in header (poll GET /inbox/unread-count every 60 seconds).
6. Auto-Save Indicator: Show "Draft saved" indicator with timestamp in form pages.
7. Session Timeout: Warning modal at 25 min inactivity, auto-logout at 30 min.
8. Responsive Design: Sidebar collapses on smaller screens, tables scroll horizontally.
9. Keyboard Navigation: Tab-navigable forms, Enter to submit, Esc to cancel dialogs.
10. Localization: i18n setup with zh-CN as primary, en as secondary.
METADATA FILE:
Create `metadata.json` at the project root with:
{
  "prompt": "<original prompt text>",
  "project_type": "server",
  "frontend_language": "vue",
  "backend_language": "java",
  "frontend_framework": "vue3",
  "backend_framework": "spring-boot",
  "database": "mysql"
}
Verify all pages render correctly, all API integrations work end-to-end, and the role-based navigation properly restricts access per role.

text.text:
Perfect! Now I have all the necessary information. Let me compile a comprehensive report.

## Project Structure Analysis

I've thoroughly explored the project at `C:/Users/PC/Documents/Eaglepoint/TASK-14/repo/`. This is a full-stack application called "Secure Exam System" - a secure exam scheduling and notification management system. Here's the detailed breakdown:

---

## 1. OVERALL DIRECTORY STRUCTURE

```
repo/
├── frontend/                    # Vue 3 + Vite application
├── src/                        # Spring Boot backend (Maven project)
├── pom.xml                     # Backend dependencies
├── .classpath, .project        # Eclipse project files
└── target/                     # Build output
```

---

## 2. FRONTEND STACK (Vue 3 + Vite)

**Framework & Tools:**
- **Vue 3** (^3.5.30)
- **Vite** (^8.0.1) - Build tool
- **Vue Router** (^4.6.3) - Client-side routing
- **Pinia** (^3.0.4) - State management (Vuex replacement)
- **TypeScript** (~5.9.3) - Type safety
- **Axios** (^1.14.0) - HTTP client
- **Additional**: crypto-js, dayjs, xlsx (Excel support)

**Configuration Files:**
- `vite.config.ts` - API proxy to backend at `http://localhost:8080`
- `tsconfig.json`, `tsconfig.app.json` - TypeScript config
- `package.json` - Dependencies and scripts

**Frontend Directory Structure (`/frontend/src`):**
```
src/
├── api/                        # API service layer
│   └── index.ts               # Axios client setup + interceptors + signature auth
├── router/
│   ├── index.ts               # Router configuration (beforeEach/afterEach guards)
│   └── routes.ts              # All route definitions with role-based access
├── stores/                     # Pinia stores (state management)
│   ├── auth.ts                # Authentication, user profile, session
│   ├── sessions.ts            # Exam sessions data
│   ├── rosters.ts             # Student rosters
│   └── notifications.ts       # Notifications data
├── layouts/
│   └── MainLayout.vue         # Main app layout with sidebar + header
├── components/
│   ├── ImportWizard/          # Multi-step import wizard
│   ├── VersionDiff/           # Version comparison component
│   ├── DataTable/             # Reusable data table
│   └── FormBuilder/           # Dynamic form builder
├── views/
│   ├── auth/                  # Login, password change
│   ├── dashboard/             # Dashboard page
│   ├── scheduling/            # Session list, create, detail
│   ├── rosters/               # Roster list, import
│   ├── notifications/         # Notification list, create, compliance/anti-cheat reviews, inbox
│   ├── admin/                 # User management, job monitor, audit logs
│   ├── student/               # My exams, notification preferences
│   └── common/                # 403, 404 error pages
├── composables/               # Vue 3 composition functions
│   ├── useAuth.ts            # Authentication logic
│   ├── useRBAC.ts            # Role-based access control
│   ├── useNotifications.ts    # Notification handling
│   └── useAutoSave.ts        # Auto-save drafts
├── types/
│   ├── api.ts                # API response types
│   ├── auth.ts               # Auth types
│   └── ui.ts                 # UI types
├── utils/
│   ├── crypto.ts             # Signature generation, HMAC-SHA256
│   ├── date.ts               # Date utilities (dayjs wrapper)
│   └── pii.ts                # PII (Personally Identifiable Info) utilities
├── assets/
│   ├── theme.css             # Color variables, design tokens
│   ├── style.css             # Global styles
│   └── images/               # PNG/SVG assets
├── main.ts                    # App entry point
└── App.vue                    # Root component
```

**Key Features:**
- **API Service** (`api/index.ts`): Axios client with HMAC-SHA256 request signing for security
- **Router Guards**: Authentication checks, role-based access control, redirect logic
- **State Management**: Pinia stores for auth, sessions, rosters, notifications
- **Sidebar Navigation**: Role-based menus (ADMIN, ACADEMIC_AFFAIRS, HOMEROOM_TEACHER, SUBJECT_TEACHER, STUDENT)
- **Auto-save Drafts**: Form draft persistence with recovery on login
- **Multi-role Support**: Users can switch between roles

---

## 3. BACKEND STACK (Spring Boot 3.3.4)

**Framework & Dependencies:**
- **Spring Boot** 3.3.4 (Java 17)
- **Spring Data JPA** - ORM
- **Spring Security** - Crypto utilities
- **MySQL** - Database
- **Flyway** - Database migration
- **Apache POI + OpenCSV** - Excel/CSV import export
- **Validation, AOP, Web frameworks**

**Backend Package Structure:**
```
com/exam/system/
├── controller/                # REST endpoints (12 controllers)
│   ├── AuthController
│   ├── ExamSessionController
│   ├── UserController
│   ├── NotificationController
│   ├── ComplianceReviewController
│   ├── InboxController
│   ├── JobMonitorController
│   ├── AcademicTermController
│   ├── CampusRoomController
│   ├── SubjectController
│   ├── NotificationPreferenceController
│   └── VersionController
├── service/                   # Business logic (14+ services)
│   ├── AuthService
│   ├── ExamSessionService
│   ├── UserService
│   ├── NotificationService
│   ├── ComplianceReviewService
│   ├── InboxService
│   ├── JobMonitorService
│   ├── VersionService
│   └── impl/                 # Service implementations
│       ├── notification/     # Notification delivery services
│       └── delivery/         # Multi-channel delivery (email, SMS, WeChat)
├── entity/                    # JPA entities (36 entities)
│   ├── SysUser               # User entity
│   ├── ExamSession           # Exam session with versioning
│   ├── SessionCandidate      # Student-session mapping
│   ├── ProctorAssign         # Proctor scheduling
│   ├── RoomAssignment        # Exam room allocation
│   ├── Notification          # Notification messages
│   ├── NotifDelivery         # Delivery tracking
│   ├── ComplianceReview      # Compliance review records
│   ├── AuditLog/AuditLogArchive # Audit trail
│   ├── AutoSaveDraft         # Form draft storage
│   ├── EntityVersion         # Version history
│   ├── LoginAttempt          # Security tracking
│   ├── JobRecord             # Background job tracking
│   └── Others...
├── repository/               # Spring Data JPA repositories (32+)
│   ├── ExamSessionRepository
│   ├── SysUserRepository
│   ├── NotificationRepository
│   └── Custom projections (StudentExamProjection, etc.)
├── dto/                       # Data transfer objects
│   ├── auth/
│   ├── session/
│   ├── notification/
│   ├── compliance/
│   ├── job/
│   ├── common/               # PageData, PaginationMeta
│   └── Others...
├── config/                    # Spring configuration
│   ├── SecurityConfig        # Request signing, auth
│   ├── CorsConfig            # CORS settings
│   ├── RateLimiterConfig     # Request rate limiting
│   ├── SchedulerConfig       # Job scheduling
│   ├── WebMvcConfig          # MVC configuration
│   ├── InputSanitizer        # Request sanitization
│   └── SecurityProperties    # Config properties
├── security/                  # Security layer
│   ├── rbac/                 # Role-based access control
│   │   └── ActiveRoleGuard   # Role enforcement
│   ├── filter/               # Security filters
│   ├── crypto/               # HMAC-SHA256, encryption
│   └── TokenAuthentication
├── audit/                     # Audit & versioning
│   ├── AuditLogInterceptor   # Request/response logging
│   └── VersioningAspect      # Entity version tracking (AOP)
├── job/                       # Background jobs
│   ├── JobRecord
│   └── handler/              # Job execution handlers
├── notification/              # Notification system
│   ├── NotificationFactory
│   ├── DeliveryStrategy      # Multi-channel delivery
│   └── impl/delivery/        # Email, SMS, WeChat implementations
├── exception/                 # Custom exceptions
├── src/main/resources/
│   ├── application.yml        # Configuration
│   └── db/migration/          # Flyway SQL migrations (V1-V6)
└── ExamSystemApplication.java # Main Spring Boot class
```

**Key Backend Features:**
- **JPA Versioning**: ExamSession has `@Version` for optimistic locking
- **Audit Trail**: AuditLogInterceptor + VersioningAspect (AOP)
- **RBAC**: ActiveRoleGuard checks permissions per endpoint
- **Rate Limiting**: Per-user (60/min) and per-IP (300/min)
- **Request Signing**: HMAC-SHA256 with nonce + timestamp
- **Multi-channel Notifications**: Email, SMS, WeChat delivery
- **Background Jobs**: Async job processing with sharding support
- **Flyway Migrations**: 6 migration files (schema, roles, security, constraints, notifications, infrastructure)

---

## 4. CONFIGURATION FILES

**Frontend:**
- `/frontend/package.json` - Dependencies: Vue 3, Pinia, Axios, crypto-js, dayjs, xlsx
- `/frontend/vite.config.ts` - Vite config with API proxy, TypeScript path alias `@`
- `/frontend/tsconfig.json` - TypeScript configuration

**Backend:**
- `/pom.xml` - Maven config with Spring Boot 3.3.4, MySQL driver, POI, OpenCSV
- `/src/main/resources/application.yml`:
  - MySQL @ `localhost:3306/exam_system`
  - Credentials: `root:root`
  - Server port: 8080
  - Replay window: 120 seconds
  - Session timeout: 30 minutes
  - Rate limits: 60/user/min, 300/IP/min

---

## 5. ROUTER SETUP

**File:** `/frontend/src/router/index.ts`

**Route Guards:**
1. `beforeEach`: Authentication check, role validation, login redirect
2. `afterEach`: Page title updates

**Routes Defined:** `/frontend/src/router/routes.ts`

**Main Routes:**
- `/login` - Public login page
- `/` - MainLayout wrapper (requires auth)
  - `/dashboard` - Dashboard (ADMIN, ACADEMIC_AFFAIRS, HOMEROOM_TEACHER, SUBJECT_TEACHER)
  - `/scheduling/sessions` - Session list (4 roles)
  - `/scheduling/sessions/new` - Create session (ADMIN, ACADEMIC_AFFAIRS)
  - `/scheduling/sessions/:id` - Session detail (4 roles)
  - `/rosters` - Roster management (4 roles)
  - `/rosters/import` - Bulk import (4 roles)
  - `/notifications` - Notification management (ADMIN, ACADEMIC_AFFAIRS)
  - `/notifications/create` - Create notification (ADMIN, ACADEMIC_AFFAIRS)
  - `/notifications/compliance-reviews` - Compliance review (ADMIN, ACADEMIC_AFFAIRS)
  - `/notifications/anti-cheat` - Anti-cheat review (ADMIN, ACADEMIC_AFFAIRS)
  - `/notifications/inbox` - Student inbox (STUDENT)
  - `/admin/users` - User management (ADMIN)
  - `/admin/jobs` - Job monitor (ADMIN)
  - `/admin/audit-logs` - Audit logs (ADMIN, ACADEMIC_AFFAIRS)
  - `/student/exams` - My exams (STUDENT)
  - `/student/preferences` - Notification preferences (STUDENT)
  - `/auth/change-password` - Password change (All roles)
- `/403` - Forbidden page
- `/:pathMatch(.*)*` - 404 Not Found

---

## 6. MAIN LAYOUT & SIDEBAR

**File:** `/frontend/src/layouts/MainLayout.vue`

**Components:**
- **Sidebar**: Role-based navigation menu (280px fixed width)
- **Header/Topbar**: User info, role switcher dropdown, change password link, logout button
- **Content Area**: RouterView for page content
- **Modals**: Session timeout warning, draft recovery prompt

**Role-Based Menu Items:**
- **ADMIN** (9 items): Dashboard, Users, Scheduling, Rosters, Notifications, Compliance, Anti-cheat, Jobs, Audit Logs
- **ACADEMIC_AFFAIRS** (7 items): Dashboard, Scheduling, Rosters, Notifications, Compliance, Anti-cheat, Audit Logs
- **HOMEROOM_TEACHER** (3 items): Dashboard, Scheduling (readonly), Rosters
- **SUBJECT_TEACHER** (3 items): Dashboard, Scheduling (readonly), Course Rosters
- **STUDENT** (3 items): My Exams, Inbox, Notification Preferences

---

## 7. API SERVICE CONFIGURATION

**File:** `/frontend/src/api/index.ts`

**Setup:**
- Base URL: `/api/v1` (proxied to `http://localhost:8080` via Vite)
- Timeout: 20 seconds
- Headers: Authorization, X-Timestamp, X-Nonce, X-Signature

**Request Interceptor:**
- For all requests except login, adds:
  - `X-Timestamp`: Unix timestamp in seconds
  - `X-Nonce`: Random nonce
  - `X-Signature`: HMAC-SHA256(method+path+timestamp+nonce+bodyHash, secret)
  - `Authorization`: Bearer token
- Uses `sessionSecret` if available, otherwise falls back to token

**Response Interceptor:**
- Catches 401 errors and triggers logout with `SESSION_EXPIRED` reason

**Response Unwrapper:**
- `unwrap()` extracts `response.data.data` (API returns nested data structure)

---

## 8. STORES/STATE MANAGEMENT (Pinia)

**`/frontend/src/stores/auth.ts`:**
- `token`, `sessionSecret`, `user`, `rememberDevice`, `loginAt`
- Methods: `login()`, `logout()`, `switchRole()`, `fetchProfile()`, `extendSession()`
- Computed: `isAuthenticated`, `activeRole`, `availableRoles`, `homePath`
- Session persistence to localStorage

**`/frontend/src/stores/sessions.ts`:**
- `sessions` (PageData), `loading`
- Methods: `fetchSessions(params)`

**`/frontend/src/stores/rosters.ts`:**
- `rows` (PageData), `loading`
- Methods: `fetchBySession()`, `updateSeat()`

**`/frontend/src/stores/notifications.ts`:**
- Notification list, delivery tracking, compliance reviews

---

## 9. KEY FILE LOCATIONS

**Frontend Source Files:**

- Router: `/frontend/src/router/index.ts`, `/frontend/src/router/routes.ts`
- Layout: `/frontend/src/layouts/MainLayout.vue`
- API Service: `/frontend/src/api/index.ts`
- Stores: `/frontend/src/stores/{auth,sessions,rosters,notifications}.ts`
- Views (12 pages): `/frontend/src/views/{auth,dashboard,scheduling,rosters,notifications,admin,student,common}/*.vue`
- Components: `/frontend/src/components/{ImportWizard,VersionDiff,DataTable,FormBuilder}/*.vue`
- Composables: `/frontend/src/composables/use{Auth,RBAC,Notifications,AutoSave}.ts`
- Types: `/frontend/src/types/{api,auth,ui}.ts`
- Utils: `/frontend/src/utils/{crypto,date,pii}.ts`
- Theme/Styles: `/frontend/src/assets/{theme.css,style.css}`

**Backend Source Files:**

- Main Class: `/src/main/java/com/exam/system/ExamSystemApplication.java`
- Controllers (12): `/src/main/java/com/exam/system/controller/*Controller.java`
- Services (14+): `/src/main/java/com/exam/system/service/*.java` + `/impl/`
- Entities (36): `/src/main/java/com/exam/system/entity/*.java`
- Repositories (32+): `/src/main/java/com/exam/system/repository/*Repository.java`
- DTOs: `/src/main/java/com/exam/system/dto/{auth,session,notification,compliance,job,common}/*Dto.java`
- Security: `/src/main/java/com/exam/system/{security,config,audit}/*.java`
- Config: `/src/main/resources/application.yml`
- Migrations: `/src/main/resources/db/migration/V{1-6}__*.sql`

This comprehensive project demonstrates enterprise-level architecture with proper separation of concerns, security implementations (HMAC signing, RBAC, audit logging), and modern tech stacks on both frontend (Vue 3/Vite) and backend (Spring Boot 3 with JPA).

text.text:
Perfect! I have successfully read all the requested files. Let me compile the complete content summary for you:

## Complete Frontend Source Files Summary

I have successfully read all 20 files from your frontend source directory. Here's what exists:

### 1. **views/dashboard/DashboardPage.vue** (Lines 1-201)
- Dashboard with role-aware display
- Shows admin stats (sessions, reviews, jobs, anti-cheat flags) or student exam schedule
- Uses `formatDateTime` utility and auth store

### 2. **views/admin/UserManagementPage.vue** (Lines 1-90)
- Admin user directory with DataTable
- Supports role and status filtering
- Includes unlock user action

### 3. **views/admin/JobMonitorPage.vue** (Lines 1-119)
- Distributed queue job monitoring
- Shows job type, status, attempts, retry times
- Detail drawer and retry functionality

### 4. **views/admin/AuditLogPage.vue** (Lines 1-74)
- Audit events tracking with date range filtering
- Shows actor, action, entity type, and timestamps
- Uses DataTable component

### 5. **views/notifications/ComplianceReviewPage.vue** (Lines 1-92)
- Compliance review queue for admin/academic staff
- Approve/reject functionality
- Shows content type, status, and decision time

### 6. **views/notifications/AntiCheatReviewPage.vue** (Lines 1-90)
- Anti-cheat flag review (activity burst, identical submissions, score delta)
- Mark reviewed action
- Risk score display

### 7. **views/notifications/NotificationListPage.vue** (Lines 1-124)
- Notification management with publish/review workflows
- Shows event type, title, priority, compliance status
- Link to create new notifications

### 8. **views/notifications/NotificationCreatePage.vue** (Lines 1-133)
- 3-step form for creating notifications
- Steps: basic info, content (title/body), target scope (grade/class)
- Uses FormBuilder component with auto-save

All tasks are complete. Here's a summary of everything implemented:

## Implementation Summary

### New Files Created
- **`i18n/zh-CN.ts`**, **`i18n/en.ts`**, **`i18n/index.ts`** - Full i18n setup with zh-CN primary and en secondary
- **`utils/toast.ts`** - Toast notification system with global error handler mapping backend error codes to user-friendly messages
- **`views/admin/CampusRoomPage.vue`** - Campus & Room Management with expandable rows, Add/Edit dialogs, capacity visualization bars
- **`metadata.json`** - Project metadata at project root

### Enhanced Pages (Full Rewrites)

1. **Dashboard** (`/dashboard`) - Term selector dropdown, 6 stat cards (including Total Students), quick-action buttons, skeleton loading, breadcrumbs

2. **User Management** (`/admin/users`) - Create/Edit User dialogs, password strength meter, role checkbox selection, scope assignment, status dropdown filters, row actions (Edit, Delete soft, Unlock, Toggle Sessions), PII masking, status badges

3. **Job Monitor** (`/admin/jobs`) - Colored status badges (green/red/yellow/gray), dropdown filters for jobType and status, job detail modal with full payload_json, retry only for FAILED jobs

4. **Audit Logs** (`/admin/audit-logs`) - IP Address column, resource type/action type dropdowns, expandable rows for details_json (formatted JSON viewer), CSV export button, date range picker

5. **Compliance Reviews** (`/notifications/compliance-reviews`) - Status filter tabs (Pending/Approved/Rejected), review detail modal with content preview + target scope, comments textarea, confirmation modal before approve/reject, pending badge count

6. **Anti-Cheat Review** (`/notifications/anti-cheat`) - Status filter tabs (Pending/Cleared/Confirmed Fraud), review detail with visualizations: ACTIVITY_BURST timeline chart, IDENTICAL_SUBMISSIONS side-by-side comparison, ABNORMAL_SCORE_DELTA score distribution chart, CLEARED/CONFIRMED_FRAUD radio decision form, human-review-only notice

7. **Notification Management** (`/notifications`) - Status filter tabs (Draft/Pending Review/Approved/Sending/Sent/Rejected), delivery status modal with per-recipient DataTable, manual retry for failed deliveries

8. **Notification Create** (`/notifications/create`) - Preview step showing formatted notification, Create as Draft workflow, visual workflow progress (Draft -> Submit for Review -> Publish)

9. **Session Detail** - History tab with version list (version number, changed by, changed at, snapshot preview), compare mode via VersionDiff, restore with confirmation dialog + success toast

10. **MainLayout** - Toast container, notification badge polling (60s), sidebar pending review/anti-cheat badge counts, locale switcher (zh-CN/en), responsive sidebar collapse

### Integration & Polish
- **Error handling** - Global error interceptor with toast notifications
- **Loading states** - Skeleton loaders on all data tables and detail pages
- **Empty states** - Meaningful messages when lists are empty
- **Breadcrumb navigation** - Contextual breadcrumbs on all pages
- **Notification badge** - Real-time unread count polling every 60 seconds
- **Session timeout** - Warning at 25 min, auto-logout at 30 min (already existed, preserved)
- **Responsive design** - Sidebar collapses on smaller screens, tables scroll horizontally
- **Keyboard navigation** - Tab-navigable forms, Enter to submit, Esc to cancel dialogs
- **i18n** - zh-CN as primary, en as secondary with locale toggle

### Build Status
- TypeScript type check: **PASS** (zero errors)
- Vite build: **PASS** (built in 2.54s)

3.3.4 testing standards
The project must provide a complete and executable test verification plan and related test materials as a necessary part of system acceptance. The testing goal is to verify the correctness, stability, and robustness of the system's core functions, key business logic, and exception handling mechanism.
Test verification must include both unit test and API interface functional test . Both types of tests are necessary for acceptance and must not be missing. Test requirements and examples are as follows:
3.3.4.1 unit test requirements and examples
Unit testing should cover the main functional modules, core logic processing flow, and key boundary scenarios of the system, with a focus on verifying the correctness of internal logic implementation.
Example description :
For the core business computing logic, corresponding unit test cases need to be provided to verify whether the processing results under normal input, boundary input, and illegal input conditions meet expectations.
Unit test cases should be written separately for critical state transition logic (such as task creation, execution, failure, retry, etc.) to verify the correctness of behavior in each state.
For exception handling logic, the system should verify that it can correctly return error messages and maintain stable operation by constructing exception scenarios (such as null values, out-of-range parameters, etc.).
3.3.4.2 API interface functional testing requirements and examples
API interface functional testing should cover the main interfaces provided by the system to the outside world, and verify the functional integrity and stability of the interface under different input conditions.
Example description :
For the core business interface, it is necessary to provide interface call testing to verify that the interface can return correct response results under normal request parameters.
For abnormal scenarios such as missing parameters, incorrect parameter formats, and insufficient permissions, corresponding interface test cases should be provided to verify that the error codes and error messages returned by the interface comply with the interface design specifications.
For interfaces involving data changes, the correctness of the system state or data results before and after the interface call should be verified.
3.3.4.3 test execution mode and result output requirements
The following test directory structure must be included in the project root directory as a mandatory check item during acceptance:
unit_tests/ : Used to store unit test scripts and related test resources;
API_tests/ : Used to store API interface function test scripts and related test resources.
All tests must be organized and executed uniformly through shell scripts , and the test scripts should support one-click execution and have the ability to run repeatedly.
Example description :
A unified test execution script (such as run_tests.sh ) can be provided in the project root directory, and all test cases under the unit_tests/ and API_tests/ directories can be automatically called after the script is executed.
During the test execution process, clear and readable test result information should be output in the end point or log file, including the execution status (success/failure), failure reasons, and necessary error logs for each test case.
After the test execution is completed, the summary information of the test results (such as the total number of test cases, the number of passes, and the number of failures) should be output to facilitate the acceptance personnel to quickly judge the test coverage and execution status.
3.3.4.4 Acceptance Judgment Requirements
Test cases should cover the vast majority of Functional Buttons and main business logic paths . During acceptance, the acceptance party can confirm whether the test is fully executed and the results meet expectations by executing the test script and checking the test output results.
If the unit test or API interface test is missing, the test coverage is obviously insufficient, the test script cannot be executed, or the test result output is unclear, it is considered as not meeting the acceptance requirements .

text.text:
Perfect! I've successfully read all 12 requested files. Here's a complete summary:

## File Contents Summary

### 1. LoginRequest.java
Contains username and password fields with `@NotBlank` validation, plus optional fields for device remember functionality and device fingerprint.

### 2. LoginResponse.java
Response DTO with token (JWT), expiresIn (long), and a UserProfileDto object.

### 3. SessionUpsertRequest.java
Request for exam session creation/update with termId, subjectId, gradeId, date, startTime, endTime, status, and lists for room assignments, candidates, and proctors. Uses `@NotNull` and `@Valid` annotations.

### 4. NotificationCreateRequest.java
Request for creating notifications with eventType, title, body, priority (all @NotBlank), and a NotificationTargetScopeDto target scope (@NotNull).

### 5. CreateUserRequest.java
Request for user creation with username, password (@NotBlank), required list of role strings (@NotEmpty), and optional UserRequestScopeDto.

### 6. UpdateUserRequest.java
Request for updating user with optional username, roles list, and scopes (no validation annotations).

### 7. PageData.java
Generic pagination wrapper with List<T> items and PaginationMeta pagination metadata.

### 8. SecurityConfig.java
Spring configuration registering 4 servlet filters in order:
1. RequestSizeLimitFilter (order 1)
2. ReplayGuardFilter (order 2)
3. RateLimitFilter (order 3)
4. AuthFilter (order 4)

All target "/api/*" patterns.

### 9. UserStatus.java
Enum with three values: ACTIVE, LOCKED, DISABLED.

### 10. SysRole.java
JPA entity with id (auto-generated), unique name (64 chars), and optional description (255 chars).

### 11. application.yml
Spring Boot configuration for:
- Server on port 8080
- MySQL database (exam_system)
- JPA/Hibernate with validation DDL mode
- Flyway migrations enabled
- Security settings (replay window, HMAC secret, AES key, rate limits, request size limits, session timeouts, device remember days)
- Job sharding configuration
- WeChat disabled
- Logging for com.exam.system at INFO level

### 12. pom.xml
Maven POM for Spring Boot 3.3.4 (Java 17) exam system with dependencies for:
- Spring Web, Data JPA, Validation, AOP
- Spring Security crypto
- Flyway (database migrations)
- MySQL connector
- Apache POI (Excel support)
- OpenCSV
- Test dependencies (JUnit, H2)

All files have been read in their entirety with line numbers preserved.

{"file_path": "C:/Users/PC/Documents/Eaglepoint/TASK-14/repo/unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh", "content": "#!/usr/bin/env bash
#
# Unit Test Runner for Secure Exam Scheduling System
# Compiles and runs all JUnit 5 unit tests under unit_tests/
#
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)"
TEST_SRC="$SCRIPT_DIR"
BUILD_DIR="$PROJECT_ROOT/target/unit-test-classes"
RESULT_FILE="$PROJECT_ROOT/target/unit-test-results.txt"

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
NC='\033[0m'

echo "============================================"
echo "  UNIT TEST RUNNER"
echo "  Secure Exam Scheduling System"
echo "============================================"
echo ""

# Ensure Maven dependencies are available
echo "[INFO] Resolving Maven dependencies..."
cd "$PROJECT_ROOT"
if command -v mvn &>/dev/null; then
    mvn dependency:resolve -q 2>/dev/null || true
    mvn compile -q 2>/dev/null || true
fi

# Locate JUnit jars from Maven repository
M2_REPO="${HOME}/.m2/repository"
JUNIT_PLATFORM_LAUNCHER=$(find "$M2_REPO" -name "junit-platform-console-standalone-*.jar" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

# If standalone launcher not available, try to run via Maven
if [ -z "$JUNIT_PLATFORM_LAUNCHER" ]; then
    echo "[INFO] JUnit standalone launcher not found, running tests via Maven surefire..."
    echo ""

    # Copy test sources to the Maven test directory
    MAVEN_TEST_DIR="$PROJECT_ROOT/src/test/java"
    mkdir -p "$MAVEN_TEST_DIR"

    # Copy unit test files
    find "$TEST_SRC" -name "*Test.java" -exec sh -c '
        for f do
            rel="${f#'"$TEST_SRC"'/}"
            target_dir="'"$MAVEN_TEST_DIR"'/$(dirname "$rel")"
            mkdir -p "$target_dir"
            cp "$f" "$target_dir/"
        done
    ' sh {} +

    # Run with Maven
    echo "[INFO] Running unit tests via Maven..."
    echo ""
    cd "$PROJECT_ROOT"
    mvn test -Dtest="*Test" -pl . \
        -Dspring.datasource.url="jdbc:h2:mem:testdb;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1" \
        -Dspring.datasource.driver-class-name=org.h2.Driver \
        -Dspring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=none \
        -Dspring.flyway.enabled=false \
        2>&1 | tee "$RESULT_FILE"

    TEST_EXIT=$?

    # Clean up copied test files
    find "$MAVEN_TEST_DIR" -name "*Test.java" -delete 2>/dev/null || true
    find "$MAVEN_TEST_DIR" -type d -empty -delete 2>/dev/null || true

    echo ""
    if [ $TEST_EXIT -eq 0 ]; then
        echo -e "${GREEN}[PASS] All unit tests passed.${NC}"
    else
        echo -e "${RED}[FAIL] Some unit tests failed. Check output above.${NC}"
    fi
    exit $TEST_EXIT
fi

# If standalone launcher is available, use it directly
echo "[INFO] Using JUnit Platform Console Standalone..."

# Collect classpath
MAIN_CLASSES="$PROJECT_ROOT/target/classes"
CLASSPATH="$MAIN_CLASSES"

# Add all Maven dependency jars
for jar in "$M2_REPO"/org/springframework/**/*.jar "$M2_REPO"/jakarta/**/*.jar; do
    [ -f "$jar" ] && CLASSPATH="$CLASSPATH:$jar"
done

mkdir -p "$BUILD_DIR"

# Compile test sources
echo "[INFO] Compiling unit tests..."
find "$TEST_SRC" -name "*.java" > /tmp/unit_test_sources.txt
javac -d "$BUILD_DIR" -cp "$CLASSPATH:$JUNIT_PLATFORM_LAUNCHER" @/tmp/unit_test_sources.txt 2>&1

echo "[INFO] Running unit tests..."
echo ""

java -jar "$JUNIT_PLATFORM_LAUNCHER" \
    --classpath "$BUILD_DIR:$CLASSPATH" \
    --scan-classpath "$BUILD_DIR" \
    2>&1 | tee "$RESULT_FILE"

TEST_EXIT=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
echo ""
if [ $TEST_EXIT -eq 0 ]; then
    echo -e "${GREEN}[PASS] All unit tests passed.${NC}"
else
    echo -e "${RED}[FAIL] Some unit tests failed. Check output above.${NC}"
fi
exit $TEST_EXIT
"}

#
# Unit Test Runner for Secure Exam Scheduling System
# Compiles and runs all JUnit 5 unit tests under unit_tests/

set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"

    mvn dependency:resolve -q 2>/dev/null || true
    mvn compile -q 2>/dev/null || true
fi

    # Copy test sources to the Maven test directory
    MAVEN_TEST_DIR="$PROJECT_ROOT/src/test/java"

    echo ""
    cd "$PROJECT_ROOT"
    mvn test -Dtest="*Test" -pl . \
        -Dspring.datasource.url="jdbc:h2:mem:testdb;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1" \
        -Dspring.datasource.driver-class-name=org.h2.Driver \
        -Dspring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=none \
        -Dspring.flyway.enabled=false \
        2>&1 | tee "$RESULT_FILE"

    TEST_EXIT=$?

    # Clean up copied test files
    find "$MAVEN_TEST_DIR" -name "*Test.java" -delete 2>/dev/null || true
    find "$MAVEN_TEST_DIR" -type d -empty -delete 2>/dev/null || true

    echo ""
    if [ $TEST_EXIT -eq 0 ]; then
        echo -e "${GREEN}[PASS] All unit tests passed.${NC}"
    else
        echo -e "${RED}[FAIL] Some unit tests failed. Check output above.${NC}"
    fi
    exit $TEST_EXIT
fi

# If standalone launcher is available, use it directly
echo "[INFO] Using JUnit Platform Console Standalone..."

# Collect classpath
MAIN_CLASSES="$PROJECT_ROOT/target/classes"
CLASSPATH="$MAIN_CLASSES"

# Add all Maven dependency jars
for jar in "$M2_REPO"/org/springframework/**/*.jar "$M2_REPO"/jakarta/**/*.jar; do
    [ -f "$jar" ] && CLASSPATH="$CLASSPATH:$jar"
done

mkdir -p "$BUILD_DIR"

# Compile test sources
echo "[INFO] Compiling unit tests..."
find "$TEST_SRC" -name "*.java" > /tmp/unit_test_sources.txt
javac -d "$BUILD_DIR" -cp "$CLASSPATH:$JUNIT_PLATFORM_LAUNCHER" @/tmp/unit_test_sources.txt 2>&1

echo "[INFO] Running unit tests..."
echo ""

java -jar "$JUNIT_PLATFORM_LAUNCHER" \
    --classpath "$BUILD_DIR:$CLASSPATH" \
    --scan-classpath "$BUILD_DIR" \
    2>&1 | tee "$RESULT_FILE"

TEST_EXIT=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
echo ""
if [ $TEST_EXIT -eq 0 ]; then
    echo -e "${GREEN}[PASS] All unit tests passed.${NC}"
else
    echo -e "${RED}[FAIL] Some unit tests failed. Check output above.${NC}"
fi
exit $TEST_EXIT
"}

{"file_path": "C:/Users/PC/Documents/Eaglepoint/TASK-14/repo/API_tests/run_api_tests.sh", "content": "#!/usr/bin/env bash
#
# API Functional Test Runner for Secure Exam Scheduling System
# Tests all REST API endpoints with curl for correctness, validation, and error handling.
#
# Prerequisites: Backend server running on localhost:8080
#
set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
BASE_URL="${API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:8080/api/v1}"
RESULT_FILE="${SCRIPT_DIR}/api-test-results.txt"

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m'

TOTAL=0
PASSED=0
FAILED=0
FAILURES=""

# Auth token (populated after login)
TOKEN=""

# ======================================================================
# Helper functions
# ======================================================================

log_header() {
    echo ""
    echo -e "${CYAN}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${NC}"
    echo -e "${CYAN}  $1${NC}"
    echo -e "${CYAN}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${NC}"
}

# assert_status <test_name> <expected_http_status> <curl_args...>
assert_status() {
    local test_name="$1"
    local expected_status="$2"
    shift 2

    TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
    local response
    response=$(curl -s -o /tmp/api_test_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" "$@" 2>/dev/null)

    if [ "$response" = "$expected_status" ]; then
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}[PASS]${NC} $test_name (HTTP $response)"
        PASSED=$((PASSED + 1))
    else
        echo -e "  ${RED}[FAIL]${NC} $test_name — Expected HTTP $expected_status, got HTTP $response"
        local body
        body=$(cat /tmp/api_test_body.txt 2>/dev/null | head -c 200)
        echo -e "         Response: $body"
        FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
        FAILURES="${FAILURES}\n  - $test_name (expected $expected_status, got $response)"
    fi
}

# assert_json_field <test_name> <expected_http_status> <json_field> <expected_value> <curl_args...>
assert_json_field() {
    local test_name="$1"
    local expected_status="$2"
    local json_field="$3"
    local expected_value="$4"
    shift 4

    TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
    local response
    response=$(curl -s -o /tmp/api_test_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" "$@" 2>/dev/null)
    local body
    body=$(cat /tmp/api_test_body.txt 2>/dev/null)

    if [ "$response" != "$expected_status" ]; then
        echo -e "  ${RED}[FAIL]${NC} $test_name — Expected HTTP $expected_status, got HTTP $response"
        FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
        FAILURES="${FAILURES}\n  - $test_name (expected $expected_status, got $response)"
        return
    fi

    # Simple check: look for the expected value in the body
    if echo "$body" | grep -q "$expected_value"; then
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}[PASS]${NC} $test_name (HTTP $response, found '$expected_value')"
        PASSED=$((PASSED + 1))
    else
        echo -e "  ${RED}[FAIL]${NC} $test_name — Field '$json_field' did not contain '$expected_value'"
        echo -e "         Response: $(echo "$body" | head -c 200)"
        FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
        FAILURES="${FAILURES}\n  - $test_name (missing '$expected_value' in response)"
    fi
}

auth_header() {
    echo "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"
}

# ======================================================================
# Start testing
# ======================================================================

echo "============================================"
echo "  API FUNCTIONAL TEST RUNNER"
echo "  Secure Exam Scheduling System"
echo "  Target: $BASE_URL"
echo "============================================"
echo ""

# Check if server is reachable
echo "[INFO] Checking server connectivity..."
SERVER_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/../actuator/health" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")
if [ "$SERVER_STATUS" = "000" ]; then
    # Try the base URL directly
    SERVER_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "${BASE_URL}/auth/login" -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{}' 2>/dev/null || echo "000")
fi
if [ "$SERVER_STATUS" = "000" ]; then
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN] Server not reachable at $BASE_URL. Tests will run but may all fail.${NC}"
    echo -e "${YELLOW}       Start the backend server first: cd repo && mvn spring-boot:run${NC}"
    echo ""
fi

# ======================================================================
# 1. Authentication API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "1. Authentication API Tests (/auth)"

assert_status \
    "Login with empty body should return 400" \
    "400" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/auth/login" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{}'

assert_status \
    "Login with missing password should return 400" \
    "400" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/auth/login" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"username":"admin"}'

assert_status \
    "Login with invalid credentials should return 401" \
    "401" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/auth/login" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"username":"nonexistent","password":"wrongpassword"}'

assert_json_field \
    "Login with valid credentials should return 200 with token" \
    "200" \
    "data.token" \
    "token" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/auth/login" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"username":"admin","password":"Admin@123456!"}'

# Extract token for subsequent requests
TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/auth/login" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"username":"admin","password":"Admin@123456!"}' 2>/dev/null \
    | grep -o '"token":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4)

if [ -n "$TOKEN" ]; then
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}[INFO]${NC} Auth token obtained for subsequent tests"
else
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} Could not obtain auth token. Authenticated tests may fail."
    TOKEN="invalid-token-for-testing"
fi

assert_status \
    "Access protected endpoint without token should return 401" \
    "401" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/auth/me"

assert_status \
    "Get profile with valid token should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/auth/me" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Change password with weak password should return 400" \
    "400" \
    -X PUT "$BASE_URL/auth/change-password" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"currentPassword":"Admin@123456!","newPassword":"weak"}'

# ======================================================================
# 2. User Management API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "2. User Management API Tests (/users)"

assert_status \
    "List users should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/users?page=1&size=10" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "List users with role filter should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/users?page=1&size=10&role=ADMIN" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Create user with missing username should return 400" \
    "400" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/users" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"password":"StrongP@ss123!","roles":["STUDENT"]}'

assert_status \
    "Create user with empty roles should return 400" \
    "400" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/users" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"username":"testuser","password":"StrongP@ss123!","roles":[]}'

assert_status \
    "Create user with valid data should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/users" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"username":"apitest_user_'"$RANDOM"'","password":"StrongP@ss123!","roles":["STUDENT"]}'

assert_status \
    "Get non-existent user should return 404" \
    "404" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/users/999999" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Unlock non-existent user should return 404" \
    "404" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/users/999999/unlock" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

# ======================================================================
# 3. Exam Session API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "3. Exam Session API Tests (/sessions)"

assert_status \
    "List sessions should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/sessions?page=1&size=10" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Create session with missing required fields should return 400" \
    "400" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/sessions" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{}'

assert_status \
    "Create session with valid data should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/sessions" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"termId":1,"subjectId":1,"gradeId":1,"date":"2026-06-15","startTime":"09:00","endTime":"11:00","status":"DRAFT"}'

assert_status \
    "Get non-existent session should return 404" \
    "404" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/sessions/999999" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Create session with invalid date format should return 400" \
    "400" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/sessions" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"termId":1,"subjectId":1,"gradeId":1,"date":"invalid-date","startTime":"09:00","endTime":"11:00","status":"DRAFT"}'

# ======================================================================
# 4. Notification API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "4. Notification API Tests (/notifications)"

assert_status \
    "List notifications should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/notifications?page=1&size=10" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Create notification with missing fields should return 400" \
    "400" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/notifications" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"title":"test"}'

assert_status \
    "Create notification with valid data should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/notifications" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"eventType":"EXAM_SCHEDULE_PUBLISHED","title":"Test Notification","body":"Test body content","priority":"HIGH","targetScope":{"gradeId":1,"subjectId":1}}'

assert_status \
    "Submit review for non-existent notification should return 404" \
    "404" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/notifications/999999/submit-review" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Publish non-existent notification should return 404" \
    "404" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/notifications/999999/publish" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

# ======================================================================
# 5. Compliance Review API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "5. Compliance Review API Tests (/compliance-reviews)"

assert_status \
    "List compliance reviews should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/compliance-reviews?page=1&size=10" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "List reviews with status filter should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/compliance-reviews?page=1&size=10&status=PENDING" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Get non-existent review should return 404" \
    "404" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/compliance-reviews/999999" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Approve non-existent review should return 404" \
    "404" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/compliance-reviews/999999/approve" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"comments":"ok"}'

assert_status \
    "Reject non-existent review should return 404" \
    "404" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/compliance-reviews/999999/reject" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"comments":"not ok"}'

# ======================================================================
# 6. Job Monitor API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "6. Job Monitor API Tests (/jobs)"

assert_status \
    "List jobs should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/jobs?page=1&size=10" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "List jobs with status filter should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/jobs?page=1&size=10&status=FAILED" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Get non-existent job should return 404" \
    "404" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/jobs/999999" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Retry non-existent job should return 404" \
    "404" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/jobs/999999/retry" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

# ======================================================================
# 7. Audit Log API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "7. Audit Log API Tests (/audit-logs)"

assert_status \
    "List audit logs should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/audit-logs?page=1&size=10" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "List audit logs with date filter should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/audit-logs?page=1&size=10&from=2026-01-01&to=2026-12-31" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "List audit logs with action filter should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/audit-logs?page=1&size=10&actionType=LOGIN" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

# ======================================================================
# 8. Campus & Room API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "8. Campus & Room API Tests (/campuses)"

assert_status \
    "List campuses should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/campuses" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Create campus with valid data should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/campuses" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"name":"Test Campus '"$RANDOM"'"}'

assert_status \
    "Create campus with empty name should return 400" \
    "400" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/campuses" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \

assert_status \
    "Get non-existent campus should return 404" \

    -X GET "$BASE_URL/campuses/999999" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

# ======================================================================
# 9. Version History API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "9. Version History API Tests (/versions)"

assert_status \
    "List versions for entity should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/versions?entityType=EXAM_SESSION&entityId=1&page=1&size=10" \

assert_status \

# ======================================================================

# ======================================================================
# 12. Inbox API Tests (requires STUDENT role)

# ======================================================================

    -X PUT "$BASE_URL/drafts/test-form-key" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"field1":"value1","field2":"value2"}'

assert_status \
    "Load draft should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/drafts/test-form-key" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Delete draft should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X DELETE "$BASE_URL/drafts/test-form-key" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

# ======================================================================
# 15. Permission / RBAC Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "15. Permission / RBAC Tests"

assert_status \
    "Admin-only endpoint without token should return 401" \
    "401" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/users?page=1&size=10"

assert_status \
    "Admin-only endpoint with invalid token should return 401" \
    "401" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/users?page=1&size=10" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer invalid-token-12345"

# ======================================================================
# Test Summary
# ======================================================================

echo ""
echo "============================================"
echo "  API TEST RESULTS SUMMARY"
echo "============================================"
echo ""
echo "  Total test cases:  $TOTAL"
echo -e "  ${GREEN}Passed:            $PASSED${NC}"
echo -e "  ${RED}Failed:            $FAILED${NC}"
echo ""

if [ $FAILED -gt 0 ]; then
    echo -e "${RED}Failed tests:${NC}"
    echo -e "$FAILURES"
    echo ""
fi

PASS_RATE=0
if [ $TOTAL -gt 0 ]; then
    PASS_RATE=$((PASSED * 100 / TOTAL))
fi
echo "  Pass rate: ${PASS_RATE}%"
echo ""

# Write results to file
{
    echo "API Test Results — $(date)"
    echo "Target: $BASE_URL"
    echo ""
    echo "Total: $TOTAL"
    echo "Passed: $PASSED"
    echo "Failed: $FAILED"
    echo "Pass rate: ${PASS_RATE}%"
    if [ $FAILED -gt 0 ]; then
        echo ""
        echo "Failures:"
        echo -e "$FAILURES"
    fi
} > "$RESULT_FILE"

echo "[INFO] Results written to: $RESULT_FILE"

if [ $FAILED -gt 0 ]; then
    exit 1
fi
exit 0
"}

function.arguments:
{"file_path": "C:/Users/PC/Documents/Eaglepoint/TASK-14/repo/API_tests/run_api_tests.sh", "content": "#!/usr/bin/env bash
#
# API Functional Test Runner for Secure Exam Scheduling System
# Tests all REST API endpoints with curl for correctness, validation, and error handling.
#
# Prerequisites: Backend server running on localhost:8080
#
set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
BASE_URL="${API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:8080/api/v1}"
RESULT_FILE="${SCRIPT_DIR}/api-test-results.txt"

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m'

TOTAL=0
PASSED=0
FAILED=0
FAILURES=""

# Auth token (populated after login)
TOKEN=""

# ======================================================================
# Helper functions
# ======================================================================

log_header() {
    echo ""
    echo -e "${CYAN}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${NC}"
    echo -e "${CYAN}  $1${NC}"
    echo -e "${CYAN}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━${NC}"
}

# assert_status <test_name> <expected_http_status> <curl_args...>
assert_status() {
    local test_name="$1"
    local expected_status="$2"
    shift 2

    TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
    local response
    response=$(curl -s -o /tmp/api_test_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" "$@" 2>/dev/null)

    if [ "$response" = "$expected_status" ]; then
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}[PASS]${NC} $test_name (HTTP $response)"
        PASSED=$((PASSED + 1))
    else
        echo -e "  ${RED}[FAIL]${NC} $test_name — Expected HTTP $expected_status, got HTTP $response"
        local body
        body=$(cat /tmp/api_test_body.txt 2>/dev/null | head -c 200)
        echo -e "         Response: $body"
        FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
        FAILURES="${FAILURES}\n  - $test_name (expected $expected_status, got $response)"
    fi
}

# assert_json_field <test_name> <expected_http_status> <json_field> <expected_value> <curl_args...>
assert_json_field() {
    local test_name="$1"
    local expected_status="$2"
    local json_field="$3"
    local expected_value="$4"
    shift 4

    TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
    local response
    response=$(curl -s -o /tmp/api_test_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" "$@" 2>/dev/null)
    local body
    body=$(cat /tmp/api_test_body.txt 2>/dev/null)

    if [ "$response" != "$expected_status" ]; then
        echo -e "  ${RED}[FAIL]${NC} $test_name — Expected HTTP $expected_status, got HTTP $response"
        FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
        FAILURES="${FAILURES}\n  - $test_name (expected $expected_status, got $response)"
        return
    fi

    # Simple check: look for the expected value in the body
    if echo "$body" | grep -q "$expected_value"; then
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}[PASS]${NC} $test_name (HTTP $response, found '$expected_value')"
        PASSED=$((PASSED + 1))
    else
        echo -e "  ${RED}[FAIL]${NC} $test_name — Field '$json_field' did not contain '$expected_value'"
        echo -e "         Response: $(echo "$body" | head -c 200)"
        FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
        FAILURES="${FAILURES}\n  - $test_name (missing '$expected_value' in response)"
    fi
}

auth_header() {
    echo "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"
}

# ======================================================================
# Start testing
# ======================================================================

echo "============================================"
echo "  API FUNCTIONAL TEST RUNNER"
echo "  Secure Exam Scheduling System"
echo "  Target: $BASE_URL"
echo "============================================"
echo ""

# Check if server is reachable
echo "[INFO] Checking server connectivity..."
SERVER_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/../actuator/health" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")
if [ "$SERVER_STATUS" = "000" ]; then
    # Try the base URL directly
    SERVER_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "${BASE_URL}/auth/login" -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{}' 2>/dev/null || echo "000")
fi
if [ "$SERVER_STATUS" = "000" ]; then
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN] Server not reachable at $BASE_URL. Tests will run but may all fail.${NC}"
    echo -e "${YELLOW}       Start the backend server first: cd repo && mvn spring-boot:run${NC}"
    echo ""
fi

# ======================================================================
# 1. Authentication API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "1. Authentication API Tests (/auth)"

assert_status \
    "Login with empty body should return 400" \
    "400" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/auth/login" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{}'

assert_status \
    "Login with missing password should return 400" \
    "400" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/auth/login" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"username":"admin"}'

assert_status \
    "Login with invalid credentials should return 401" \
    "401" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/auth/login" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"username":"nonexistent","password":"wrongpassword"}'

assert_json_field \
    "Login with valid credentials should return 200 with token" \
    "200" \
    "data.token" \
    "token" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/auth/login" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"username":"admin","password":"Admin@123456!"}'

# Extract token for subsequent requests
TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/auth/login" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"username":"admin","password":"Admin@123456!"}' 2>/dev/null \
    | grep -o '"token":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4)

if [ -n "$TOKEN" ]; then
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}[INFO]${NC} Auth token obtained for subsequent tests"
else
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} Could not obtain auth token. Authenticated tests may fail."
    TOKEN="invalid-token-for-testing"
fi

assert_status \
    "Access protected endpoint without token should return 401" \
    "401" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/auth/me"

assert_status \
    "Get profile with valid token should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/auth/me" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Change password with weak password should return 400" \
    "400" \
    -X PUT "$BASE_URL/auth/change-password" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"currentPassword":"Admin@123456!","newPassword":"weak"}'

# ======================================================================
# 2. User Management API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "2. User Management API Tests (/users)"

assert_status \
    "List users should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/users?page=1&size=10" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "List users with role filter should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/users?page=1&size=10&role=ADMIN" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Create user with missing username should return 400" \
    "400" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/users" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"password":"StrongP@ss123!","roles":["STUDENT"]}'

assert_status \
    "Create user with empty roles should return 400" \
    "400" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/users" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"username":"testuser","password":"StrongP@ss123!","roles":[]}'

assert_status \
    "Create user with valid data should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/users" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"username":"apitest_user_'"$RANDOM"'","password":"StrongP@ss123!","roles":["STUDENT"]}'

assert_status \
    "Get non-existent user should return 404" \
    "404" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/users/999999" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Unlock non-existent user should return 404" \
    "404" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/users/999999/unlock" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

# ======================================================================
# 3. Exam Session API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "3. Exam Session API Tests (/sessions)"

assert_status \
    "List sessions should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/sessions?page=1&size=10" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Create session with missing required fields should return 400" \
    "400" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/sessions" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{}'

assert_status \
    "Create session with valid data should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X POST "$BASE_URL/sessions" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"termId":1,"subjectId":1,"gradeId":1,"date":"2026-06-15","startTime":"09:00","endTime":"11:00","status":"DRAFT"}'

assert_status \
    "Get non-existent session should return 404" \
    "404" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/sessions/999999" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Create session with invalid date format should return 400" \
    "400" \

    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"termId":1,"subjectId":1,"gradeId":1,"date":"invalid-date","startTime":"09:00","endTime":"11:00","status":"DRAFT"}'

# ======================================================================

log_header "4. Notification API Tests (/notifications)"

assert_status \

assert_status \

assert_status \

# ======================================================================
# 5. Compliance Review API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "5. Compliance Review API Tests (/compliance-reviews)"

assert_status \

# ======================================================================

# ======================================================================
log_header "6. Job Monitor API Tests (/jobs)"

assert_status \

# ======================================================================

log_header "10. Academic Term API Tests (/terms)"

assert_status \

    -H "$(auth_header)"

# ======================================================================
# 11. Dashboard API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "11. Dashboard API Tests (/dashboard)"

assert_status \

assert_status \

# ======================================================================
# 12. Inbox API Tests (requires STUDENT role)
# ======================================================================
log_header "12. Inbox API Tests (/inbox)"

assert_status \

assert_status \

# ======================================================================
# 13. Anti-Cheat API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "13. Anti-Cheat Flag API Tests (/anti-cheat)"

assert_status \

assert_status \
    "Get non-existent flag should return 404" \
    "404" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/anti-cheat/flags/999999" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

# ======================================================================
# 14. Auto-Save Draft API Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "14. Auto-Save Draft API Tests (/drafts)"

assert_status \
    "Save draft should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X PUT "$BASE_URL/drafts/test-form-key" \
    -H "$(auth_header)" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"field1":"value1","field2":"value2"}'

assert_status \
    "Load draft should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/drafts/test-form-key" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

assert_status \
    "Delete draft should return 200" \
    "200" \
    -X DELETE "$BASE_URL/drafts/test-form-key" \
    -H "$(auth_header)"

# ======================================================================
# 15. Permission / RBAC Tests
# ======================================================================
log_header "15. Permission / RBAC Tests"

assert_status \
    "Admin-only endpoint without token should return 401" \
    "401" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/users?page=1&size=10"

assert_status \
    "Admin-only endpoint with invalid token should return 401" \
    "401" \
    -X GET "$BASE_URL/users?page=1&size=10" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer invalid-token-12345"

# ======================================================================
# Test Summary
# ======================================================================

echo ""
echo "============================================"
echo "  API TEST RESULTS SUMMARY"
echo "============================================"
echo ""
echo "  Total test cases:  $TOTAL"
echo -e "  ${GREEN}Passed:            $PASSED${NC}"
echo -e "  ${RED}Failed:            $FAILED${NC}"
echo ""

if [ $FAILED -gt 0 ]; then
    echo -e "${RED}Failed tests:${NC}"
    echo -e "$FAILURES"
    echo ""
fi

PASS_RATE=0
if [ $TOTAL -gt 0 ]; then
    PASS_RATE=$((PASSED * 100 / TOTAL))
fi
echo "  Pass rate: ${PASS_RATE}%"
echo ""

# Write results to file
{
    echo "API Test Results — $(date)"
    echo "Target: $BASE_URL"
    echo ""
    echo "Total: $TOTAL"
    echo "Passed: $PASSED"
    echo "Failed: $FAILED"
    echo "Pass rate: ${PASS_RATE}%"
    if [ $FAILED -gt 0 ]; then
        echo ""
        echo "Failures:"
        echo -e "$FAILURES"
    fi
} > "$RESULT_FILE"

echo "[INFO] Results written to: $RESULT_FILE"

if [ $FAILED -gt 0 ]; then
    exit 1
fi
exit 0
"}

content.arguments:
{"file_path": "C:/Users/PC/Documents/Eaglepoint/TASK-14/repo/run_tests.sh", "content": "#!/usr/bin/env bash
#
# Unified Test Runner — Secure Exam Scheduling & Notification Management System
#
# Executes both unit tests and API functional tests, then produces a combined summary.
#
# Usage:
#   ./run_tests.sh              # Run all tests (unit + API)
#   ./run_tests.sh unit         # Run only unit tests
#   ./run_tests.sh api          # Run only API tests
#
# Prerequisites:
#   - Java 17+ and Maven for unit tests
#   - curl and a running backend server for API tests
#
set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
MODE="${1:-all}"

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
BOLD='\033[1m'
NC='\033[0m'

UNIT_EXIT=0
API_EXIT=0
UNIT_SKIPPED=false
API_SKIPPED=false

echo ""
echo -e "${BOLD}╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗${NC}"
echo -e "${BOLD}║   Secure Exam Scheduling System — Test Runner              ║${NC}"
echo -e "${BOLD}║   Date: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')                                ║${NC}"
echo -e "${BOLD}╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝${NC}"
echo ""

# ======================================================================
# 1. UNIT TESTS
# ======================================================================
if [ "$MODE" = "all" ] || [ "$MODE" = "unit" ]; then
    echo -e "${CYAN}╭──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮${NC}"
    echo -e "${CYAN}│  PHASE 1: Unit Tests                                        │${NC}"
    echo -e "${CYAN}╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯${NC}"
    echo ""

    UNIT_SCRIPT="$SCRIPT_DIR/unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh"
    if [ -f "$UNIT_SCRIPT" ]; then
        chmod +x "$UNIT_SCRIPT"
        bash "$UNIT_SCRIPT"
        UNIT_EXIT=$?
    else
        echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN] Unit test script not found: $UNIT_SCRIPT${NC}"
        echo "[INFO] Attempting to run unit tests directly via Maven..."
        echo ""

        cd "$SCRIPT_DIR"

        # Copy test files into Maven test directory
        MAVEN_TEST_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/src/test/java"
        mkdir -p "$MAVEN_TEST_DIR"

        # Copy all unit test Java files preserving package structure
        if [ -d "$SCRIPT_DIR/unit_tests" ]; then
            find "$SCRIPT_DIR/unit_tests" -name "*Test.java" | while read -r f; do
                rel="${f#$SCRIPT_DIR/unit_tests/}"
                target_dir="$MAVEN_TEST_DIR/$(dirname "$rel")"
                mkdir -p "$target_dir"
                cp "$f" "$target_dir/"
            done
        fi

        # Run tests via Maven with H2 in-memory database
        mvn test \
            -Dspring.datasource.url="jdbc:h2:mem:testdb;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1;MODE=MySQL" \
            -Dspring.datasource.driver-class-name=org.h2.Driver \
            -Dspring.datasource.username=sa \
            -Dspring.datasource.password= \
            -Dspring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=none \
            -Dspring.flyway.enabled=false \
            -Dapp.security.hmac-secret=test-secret \
            -Dapp.security.aes-base64-key=MDEyMzQ1Njc4OWFiY2RlZjAxMjM0NTY3ODlhYmNkZWY= \
            2>&1
        UNIT_EXIT=$?

        # Cleanup copied test files
        find "$MAVEN_TEST_DIR" -name "*Test.java" -delete 2>/dev/null || true
        find "$MAVEN_TEST_DIR" -type d -empty -delete 2>/dev/null || true
    fi

    echo ""
    if [ $UNIT_EXIT -eq 0 ]; then
        echo -e "${GREEN}[UNIT TESTS] ✓ All unit tests PASSED${NC}"
    else
        echo -e "${RED}[UNIT TESTS] ✗ Some unit tests FAILED (exit code: $UNIT_EXIT)${NC}"
    fi
    echo ""
else
    UNIT_SKIPPED=true
fi

# ======================================================================
# 2. API FUNCTIONAL TESTS
# ======================================================================
if [ "$MODE" = "all" ] || [ "$MODE" = "api" ]; then
    echo -e "${CYAN}╭──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮${NC}"
    echo -e "${CYAN}│  PHASE 2: API Functional Tests                              │${NC}"
    echo -e "${CYAN}╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯${NC}"
    echo ""

    API_SCRIPT="$SCRIPT_DIR/API_tests/run_api_tests.sh"
    if [ -f "$API_SCRIPT" ]; then
        chmod +x "$API_SCRIPT"
        bash "$API_SCRIPT"
        API_EXIT=$?
    else
        echo -e "${RED}[ERROR] API test script not found: $API_SCRIPT${NC}"
        API_EXIT=1
    fi

    echo ""
    if [ $API_EXIT -eq 0 ]; then
        echo -e "${GREEN}[API TESTS] ✓ All API tests PASSED${NC}"
    else
        echo -e "${RED}[API TESTS] ✗ Some API tests FAILED (exit code: $API_EXIT)${NC}"
    fi
    echo ""
else
    API_SKIPPED=true
fi

# ======================================================================
# 3. COMBINED SUMMARY
# ======================================================================
echo ""
echo -e "${BOLD}╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗${NC}"
echo -e "${BOLD}║                    COMBINED TEST SUMMARY                    ║${NC}"
echo -e "${BOLD}╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣${NC}"

if [ "$UNIT_SKIPPED" = true ]; then
    echo -e "${BOLD}║  Unit Tests:    ${YELLOW}SKIPPED${NC}${BOLD}                                      ║${NC}"
elif [ $UNIT_EXIT -eq 0 ]; then
    echo -e "${BOLD}║  Unit Tests:    ${GREEN}PASSED${NC}${BOLD}                                       ║${NC}"
else
    echo -e "${BOLD}║  Unit Tests:    ${RED}FAILED${NC}${BOLD}                                       ║${NC}"
fi

if [ "$API_SKIPPED" = true ]; then
    echo -e "${BOLD}║  API Tests:     ${YELLOW}SKIPPED${NC}${BOLD}                                      ║${NC}"
elif [ $API_EXIT -eq 0 ]; then
    echo -e "${BOLD}║  API Tests:     ${GREEN}PASSED${NC}${BOLD}                                       ║${NC}"
else
    echo -e "${BOLD}║  API Tests:     ${RED}FAILED${NC}${BOLD}                                       ║${NC}"
fi

echo -e "${BOLD}╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝${NC}"
echo ""

# Overall exit code
OVERALL_EXIT=0
if [ $UNIT_EXIT -ne 0 ] || [ $API_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then
    OVERALL_EXIT=1
fi

if [ $OVERALL_EXIT -eq 0 ]; then
    echo -e "${GREEN}${BOLD}All tests passed successfully.${NC}"
else
    echo -e "${RED}${BOLD}Some tests failed. Review output above for details.${NC}"
fi

echo ""
echo "Test run completed at: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"
echo ""

exit $OVERALL_EXIT
"}
